kept.text:
After months of waiting, I finally got to play @WilderWorld (built with @0xPolygon) and it’s now free to play on Epic Games Store!

It honestly feels like a cyberpunk version of GTA V, and I’m blown away by how insane the graphics are 🤌

00:00 - intro
00:12 - Epic Games Store
00:29 - Combat gameplay
00:52 - Driving
01:04 - Review about the game
01:17 - Outro

It’s a huge open world where you can race, fight, explore, and just do your thing. There’s honestly a lot to get into.

It even has its own in-game economy using $WILD, where you can trade stuff and earn through mining, quests, and challenges 👀

Don’t forget to complete quests on @Immutable Play to get the most out of your grind 😏

kept.text:
$29 million per month

Epic Games is giving out rewards to Fortnite map creators - and almost no one knows about it

Meanwhile, one guy:

- never made it into the game
- I wrote an automated Python script using the Claude API
- prepared 10 finished maps in seven days
- He made $4,200 that month

- He have all the source code
- The pipeline from A to Z - he got it
- every prompt used - too

The market isn't saturated yet. First come, first served.

kept.text:
I thought this was just a demo… @WilderWorld
turns out, it feels more like a full game.

Link in the first comment 👇

Powered by @Immutable X @0xPolygon

Wiami is open now, free on Epic Games.
From the moment you jump in, the scale hits different.
What stood out to me:

• Breach events, AI constantly pushing you, no downtime
• Loot actually matters, not just random drops
• Driving feels smooth + chaotic, real traffic everywhere
• The city feels alive, not empty at all

kept.text:
KOCA OYUN STÜDYOLARI TOPLANTI ÜSTÜNE TOPLANTI YAPARKEN BİRİLERİ EVİNİN SALONUNDAN FORTNITE'I SOYUP SOĞANA ÇEVİRİYOR.

Eskiden ağacı nereye koysak diye on beş kişi tartışırken, şimdi adam Claude'a iki satır laf anlatıp haftada üç harita üretiyor. Epic Games'in ödeme havuzu resmen bedava ATM'ye dönmüş durumda.

Oyun geliştiricisi olmak için kahve tüketip sabahlamaya gerek kalmadı, yapay zekaya iyi davranıp sistemi çözen parayı kırıyor. Kodlama bilmeden dev gibi haritalar basıyorlar.
